description: The Bounty Hunter Watts Bloods is a set of the Bloods gang alliance based in the Nickerson Gardens public housing projects in Watts, Los Angeles. Founded in 1969 by Gary Barker and Bobby Jack, it is known for its violent rivalry with the Grape Street Watts Crips. The gang has over 2,000 documented members and is involved in drug trafficking, robbery, and murder. A 2004 injunction limited members' movements.
